sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section V, List of Answers on Topics 53:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section V, List of Answers on Topics 53:1
items.html: When the letters are without a filling, it indicates that there is no coarseness in the screen in them, and there is no coupling by striking that draws light. (Item 58)
